destinations.evidence: Capability values 7, 8, and 9 decode to ImageCall, AudioCall, and VideoCall and are executor capabilities.
The canonical precompile metadata assigns image/audio/video to their distinct capability tags.
destinations.snippet:
AsyncPrecompileMetadata { address: IMAGE_CALL_PRECOMPILE, capability_tag: AsyncPrecompileCapabilityTag::ImageCall, settlement: AsyncPrecompileSettlement::TwoPhase, spc_block_verified: true, short_settlement_enabled: false },
AsyncPrecompileMetadata { address: AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, capability_tag: AsyncPrecompileCapabilityTag::AudioCall, settlement: AsyncPrecompileSettlement::TwoPhase, spc_block_verified: true, short_settlement_enabled: false },
AsyncPrecompileMetadata { address: VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, capability_tag: AsyncPrecompileCapabilityTag::VideoCall, settlement: AsyncPrecompileSettlement::TwoPhase, spc_block_verified: true, short_settlement_enabled: false },

destinations.evidence: RPC validation derives the required executor capability from canonical precompile metadata and rejects mismatches.

equivalence_argument: The port implements the invariant structurally: registry decoding defines distinct media capabilities, canonical metadata binds each media address to its tag, and RPC admission enforces the derived tag.
notes: The local code implements the newer distinct-capability behavior rather than the older LLM fallback.
rationale: The commit message states that multimodal precompile addresses now route to correct capabilities, and the diff adds ImageCall/AudioCall/VideoCall enum values, marks them executor capabilities, and updates precompile-to-capability routing in validate_executor_registration. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Capability values 7, 8, and 9 must decode to ImageCall, AudioCall, and VideoCall respectively, each must be treated as an executor capability, and RPC async executor validation must require ImageCall for IMAGE_CALL_PRECOMPILE, AudioCall for AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, and VideoCall for VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE while keeping LLM and Agent precompiles on Llm capability.
suggested_falsification_tests: Register executors with only Llm, ImageCall, AudioCall, or VideoCall capabilities and call validate_executor_registration for LLM, Agent, IMAGE, AUDIO, VIDEO, and ZK precompile addresses; assert each precompile accepts only its intended capability class and that Capability::try_from(10) still fails.
summary: Multimodal precompiles use distinct executor capabilities.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Register executors with only Llm, ImageCall, AudioCall, or VideoCall capabilities and call validate_executor_registration for LLM, Agent, IMAGE, AUDIO, VIDEO, and ZK precompile addresses; assert each precompile accepts only its intended capability class and that Capability::try_from(10) still fails.
title: Multimodal precompiles use distinct capabilities
